title: Interactive Rating Component
description: A clean, accessible rating component that captures user feedback. Features a custom radio-button scale, state-swapping with JavaScript, and a 95% accessibility score via Lighthouse.

title: Frontend Quiz App
description: A functional multi-choice quiz application featuring category selection, progress tracking, and score calculation.

title: Password Generator App
description: A functional password generator applications that allows the user generate a password based on selected options, copy to clipboard and see strength rating.

title: QR Code Component
description: A fundamental layout challenge focused on CSS positioning, border-radius, and responsive typography. Utilizes semantic HTML structure with figure and figcaption for optimal SEO and accessibility.
